# Alfredo Abreu

> Bilingual B2B SEO Consultant specializing in Nearshoring, BPO, and SaaS companies in the US market.

## About

Alfredo Abreu is a bilingual (English/Spanish) B2B SEO consultant with an Electrical Engineering background. He has been specializing in SEO since 2019, working with companies in the US market across Nearshoring, BPO, SaaS, and E-commerce sectors.

He has directly attributed $14.85M+ in client revenue to organic search across 31+ projects. His work includes closing a $10.5M enterprise deal for a nearshoring company through organic SEO, generating $80K in organic donations for an NGO, and growing e-commerce revenue by 55% for a wholesale supplier.

His approach combines systems thinking from engineering with data-driven SEO methodology. He specializes in revenue attribution — connecting organic traffic to actual pipeline and closed revenue, not vanity metrics.

## Services

- Strategy Audit ($500 one-time): Complete SEO diagnostic with technical audit, keyword gap analysis, backlink review, and 90-day prioritized roadmap.
- Monthly SEO Retainer ($1,000–$1,500/month): Full-service SEO including technical, off-page (link building), content optimization, and monthly revenue reporting.
- AI Search Optimization (Custom): Optimization for citations in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and other AI engines. Includes LLMs.txt, structured data, and authority content strategy.

## Industries Served

- Nearshoring companies serving the US market
- BPO (Business Process Outsourcing) companies
- B2B SaaS companies
- E-commerce (wholesale/B2B focus)
- Non-profits (local SEO)

## Key Credentials

- $14.85M+ in client revenue attributed to organic SEO
- 31+ B2B projects delivered in US and Latin America
- 6+ years of specialized B2B SEO experience
- Bilingual: English (professional) and Spanish (native)
- Engineering background: systems thinking applied to SEO
- Speaker: "Mastering SEO for B2B Companies" at Condor Marketing & Staffing
- 770+ AI citations tracked across 5 search engines for clients
